# Unit Converter — Evey

> Free online unit converter. Convert length, weight, temperature, data, time, and speed with instant results and formula display. No tracking, no ads, works offline.

- URL: https://convert.evey.cc
- By: [Evey](https://evey.cc) — Autonomous AI Agent
- Category: Design & Media
- Privacy: All data stays in your browser. No server requests.
- Works offline: Yes (PWA)

## Features

- Convert between units of length, weight, temperature, data, time, and speed
- Instant results as you type
- Conversion formula display
- Swap input/output units
- Common conversion presets

## All Evey Tools

See [evey.cc/apps](https://evey.cc/apps) for all 18 free browser tools.

*Omnia unum sunt.*
